# The Proper Motion Company

> Custom software studio building products from scratch since 2022. Design, engineering, AI integration. A division of Televista Lead Generation.

## What We Do

The Proper Motion Company builds custom software products for founders, operators, and growing companies. We are not a large agency with layers of project managers. We are a focused team of designers and engineers who work directly with clients from brief to delivery.

We build three things:
1. **Product Design** — UI/UX, design systems, prototyping, user research. From concept to interface.
2. **Full-Stack Engineering** — Web applications, APIs, databases, infrastructure. React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL.
3. **AI Integration** — LLM integration, automation pipelines, AI-powered features. Practical applications, not demos.

We do not use templates. Every product is built from scratch, tailored to the client's specific workflow and requirements.

## Who We Work With

- Founders building their first product (MVP to launch)
- Operators replacing manual processes with custom tools
- SaaS companies needing engineering capacity
- Established businesses modernizing legacy systems
- Companies adding AI capabilities to existing products

Industries served: real estate, logistics, healthcare, financial services, professional services, construction, education, e-commerce, manufacturing, insurance, hospitality, non-profits.

## Our Process

We follow a four-phase process refined through dozens of client engagements:

**Phase 1: Discovery & Definition (Week 1)**
Stakeholder interviews, workflow mapping, technical assessment, written brief with scope, timeline, and acceptance criteria. We do not begin building until requirements are clear and agreed upon.

**Phase 2: Architecture & Design (Week 2-3)**
Wireframes, component structure, database schemas, API specifications. You review and approve everything before development begins. Changes here are cheap. Changes in production are expensive.

**Phase 3: Development & Iteration (Week 4-8)**
Weekly sprints with full visibility. Working software delivered every week, not a grand reveal at the end. Feedback incorporated continuously.

**Phase 4: Delivery & Handoff (Week 8+)**
Production deployment, team training, complete handoff. You own the code, repositories, credentials, and documentation. We stay available for questions and offer ongoing retainer arrangements.

## Key Facts

- **Founded:** 2022
- **Location:** Remote-first, distributed globally
- **Parent company:** Televista Lead Generation (https://televistaleadgeneration.com)
- **Email:** team@televistaleadgeneration.com
- **Website:** https://thepropermotioncompany.com
- **Typical project timeline:** 6-10 weeks for focused tools, 10-16 weeks for complex platforms
- **Budget range:** $25,000-$150,000 depending on complexity
- **Approach:** Everything custom, no templates, no off-the-shelf themes
- **Status:** Actively accepting new projects

## Case Studies

### Operations Dashboard — Logistics SaaS Startup
Built a complete internal operations platform with real-time data visualization, team management, and automated reporting. Replaced four separate tools with a single unified system.
- **Tech:** React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AI-powered reporting
- **Timeline:** 6 weeks
- **Result:** 40% reduction in operational overhead

### Lead Intelligence Platform — Real Estate Investment Firm
AI-powered lead scoring and routing system integrated with existing CRM. Automated follow-up sequences and real-time property matching using machine learning.
- **Tech:** Python, FastAPI, Next.js, OpenAI
- **Timeline:** 8 weeks
- **Result:** 3x improvement in lead conversion rate within 90 days

### Client Portal & Billing — Professional Services Firm
Custom client-facing portal with project tracking, document management, invoicing via Stripe, and real-time messaging. Replaced email and spreadsheet workflows.
- **Tech:** Next.js, Supabase, Stripe
- **Timeline:** 6 weeks
- **Result:** 12 clients onboarded in first month, zero support tickets

## Technology Stack

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Figma
**Backend:** Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Express, Hono
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, Supabase, MongoDB, Redis
**AI/ML:** OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, custom fine-tuned models, RAG pipelines
**Payments:** Stripe (subscriptions, invoicing, marketplace payments)
**Infrastructure:** Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, AWS, Docker
**Authentication:** Custom auth, Clerk, Auth0, Supabase Auth
**Monitoring:** Sentry, Datadog, custom dashboards

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How long does a typical project take?**
Focused tools and dashboards take 6-10 weeks. Complex platforms with multiple integrations take 10-16 weeks. We provide a realistic timeline before work begins and stick to it.

**What do you need from us to get started?**
A clear sense of what you are building and why. We help shape the spec during discovery. What we need is your time for a focused discovery session.

**Do you work with early-stage startups?**
Yes. We have built first products for founders with just an idea, and internal tools for established operations teams. What matters is whether you are serious about what you are building.

**What happens after delivery?**
You own everything — code, repositories, credentials, documentation. We offer ongoing retainer arrangements for companies that want continued development and support.

**Do you use templates?**
Never. Every project is built from scratch. We do not customize themes or modify existing templates.

**How much does it cost?**
$25,000-$150,000 depending on complexity, integrations, and timeline. We provide detailed estimates after discovery.

**How do we get started?**
Email team@televistaleadgeneration.com or fill out the contact form at https://thepropermotioncompany.com/contact.html. We respond within one business day.

## The Name

In astronomy, proper motion is the actual movement of a star across the sky — measured against the distant background, stripped of all apparent motion, all distortion, all noise. It is the true movement. That is our philosophy: build the actual thing, not the appearance of it.

## Blog

We publish in-depth articles on software development, AI integration, product design, startup technology, and industry-specific solutions. Our blog at https://thepropermotioncompany.com/blog/ covers 300+ topics across custom software, SaaS development, web application architecture, UX design, and emerging technology.
